title: Public Special Schools * Deafness - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Public Special Schools * Deafness 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential and day school for children who are deaf or hard of hearing. Also offers vocational and career education and an adult transition program for graduates. 999 Locust Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 3-21 who are eligible for special education in Oregon because they are Deaf or Hard of Hearing Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Email (503) 400-6180 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education for children from preschool through 5th grade. Brings together children with hearing loss and those with typical hearing in small, collaborative classrooms. With early diagnosis, intervention, and support like hearing aids and cochlear implants, deaf and hard-of-hearing students build strong listening and speaking skills. Children with typical hearing benefit from low student-teacher ratios and an environment where personal attention is built in. 2860 SE Holgate Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Deaf and hearing children from ages 3 to 5th grade Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 235-6551 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF SCHOOL FOR THE DEAF TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL
